Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser

package org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser
Parser API
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.marshall
    Marshalling API
  • Class
    Description
    InputStreamParser
    Subclass of Parser for byte-based parsers.
    InputStreamParser.Builder<SELF extends InputStreamParser.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    InputStreamParser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed InputStreamParser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
    InputStreamParserSession
    Subclass of parser session objects for byte-based parsers.
    InputStreamParserSession.Builder<SELF extends InputStreamParserSession.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    InputStreamParserSession.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
    ParseException
    Exception that indicates invalid syntax encountered during parsing.
    Parser
    Parent class for all Juneau parsers.
    Parser.Builder<SELF extends Parser.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    Parser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed Parser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
    Parser.Null
    Represents no Parser.
    ParserConfig
    Annotation for specifying config properties defined in Parser, InputStreamParser, and ReaderParser.
    ParserConfigAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @ParserConfig annotation.
    ParserConfigAnnotation.InputStreamParserApply
    Applies ParserConfig annotations to a InputStreamParser.Builder.
    ParserConfigAnnotation.ParserApply
    Applies ParserConfig annotations to a Parser.Builder.
    ParserConfigAnnotation.ReaderParserApply
    Applies ParserConfig annotations to a ReaderParser.Builder.
    ParserInputStream
    Input stream meant to be used as input for stream-based parsers.
    ParserListener
    Class for listening for certain parse events during a document parse.
    ParserListener.Void
    Represents no parser listener.
    ParserMatch
    Represents a parser and media type that matches an HTTP Content-Type header value.
    ParserPipe
    A wrapper around an object that a parser reads its input from.
    ParserReader
    Similar to a PushbackReader with a pushback buffer of 1 character.
    ParserSession
    Session object that lives for the duration of a single use of Parser.
    ParserSession.Builder<SELF extends ParserSession.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    ParserSession.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
    ParserSet
    Represents a group of Parsers that can be looked up by media type.
    ParserSet.Builder
    Builder class.
    ParserSet.Inherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should be inherited.
    ParserSet.NoInherit
    An identifier that the previous entries in this group should not be inherited.
    Position
    Identifies a position in a reader or input stream.
    Positionable
    Interface for objects with positions (lines/columns/byte-positions for example).
    ReaderParser
    Subclass of Parser for characters-based parsers.
    ReaderParser.Builder<SELF extends ReaderParser.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    ReaderParser.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed ReaderParser.create() / Parser.copy() path.
    ReaderParserSession
    Subclass of parser session objects for character-based parsers.
    ReaderParserSession.Builder<SELF extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<SELF>>
    Builder class.
    ReaderParserSession.DefaultBuilder
    Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed create() path (CRTP terminal).
    RuntimeParseException
    Unchecked wrapper used by the iterator(...) / stream(...) views to surface the checked IOException / ParseException cause through the Iterator / Stream API.
